title: Thoughts and things 1/10/2025
html:
The hair-greying anxiety is fading as Yahir resettles in corvallis or for his capstone class. Plan: sprint the capstone app to done, pay jeff ~4 months of rent, ship bromenu and a "fun UFC app", finish the brotein pregnancy app, and land a job — top candidates being hunkin law or a remote unitarian ministry gig.

TL;DR

  • The Jan-2025 anxiety pattern is easing as Yahir gets reabsorbed into corvallis or life and his capstone class rhythm.
  • Strategy for capstone: sprint to a finished app ASAP rather than slow-cook it.
  • 4 months of rent owed to jeff is the dominant financial pressure of the quarter; he flags asking valeria for input.
  • App backlog this week: bromenu, a UFC fan app, finishing the brotein-era pregnancy app.
  • Job hunt names: hunkin law and unitarian ministry (remote) — both peripheral to his eventual austin move arc.

capstone class · jeff · bromenu · brotein · hunkin law · unitarian ministry
